ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league operates */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "salary_cap_rule" TEXT /* Rule for the salary cap in the league */,
  "regulations" TEXT /* General regulations and rules of the league */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the league */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home base */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the team's stadium */,
  "financial_health" REAL /* Financial health indicator (e.g., debt-to-equity ratio) */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary team colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the player */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the player */,
  "performance_history" TEXT /* Performance history of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player signed to the contract */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team signing the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Base salary for the contract */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Total bonus for the contract */,
  "performance_incentives" TEXT /* Performance-based incentives for the contract */,
  "signing_bonus" INTEGER /* Signing bonus for the contract */,
  "buyout_clause" TEXT /* Buyout clause details */,
  "option_years" TEXT /* Option years (e.g., 1+1) */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., free agent, rookie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player was with for the given year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "payment_schedule" TEXT /* Payment schedule (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "tax_implications" TEXT /* Tax implications (e.g., state, federal) */,
  "escrow_account" TEXT /* Escrow account details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget */,
  "total_budget" INTEGER /* Total budget for the team */,
  "salary_cap" INTEGER /* Salary cap imposed by the league */,
  "remaining_budget" INTEGER /* Remaining budget after salary allocations */,
  "category_allocations" TEXT /* Allocations for different categories (e.g., player salaries, coaching staff, facilities) */,
  "historical_budget" TEXT /* Historical budget data for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "team_id_from" TEXT /* ID of the team trading the player away */,
  "team_id_to" TEXT /* ID of the team receiving the player */,
  "player_id_from" TEXT /* ID of the player being traded */,
  "player_id_to" TEXT /* ID of the player received in return */,
  "compensation" TEXT /* Compensation or additional terms of the trade */,
  "financial_details" TEXT /* Financial details of the trade */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* Media coverage of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_to") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("player_id_to") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("player_id_from") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_from") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "team_id_from" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is transferring from */,
  "team_id_to" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is transferring to */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer (e.g., free agency, waiver claim) */,
  "financial_details" TEXT /* Financial details of the transfer */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* Media coverage of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_from") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_to") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, league admin, financial analyst) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league the user is associated with */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions and access levels */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Activity log of user actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., player salary, team budget) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., batting average, ERA) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "impact_on_salary" TEXT /* Impact of the metric on the player's salary */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* Media coverage of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., hamstring strain, shoulder surgery) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, on DL) */,
  "medical_records" TEXT /* Medical records of the injury */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* Media coverage of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Cy Young) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* Media coverage of the award */,
  "award_history" TEXT /* Historical data of the player's awards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financials were recorded */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue for the year */,
  "expenses" INTEGER /* Total expenses for the year */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Net profit for the year */,
  "financial_details" TEXT /* Detailed financial records */,
  "historical_data" TEXT /* Historical financial data for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_financials_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
